name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Happiest of Holidays to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress |
body:
Dear Peter,

Happy Holidays and a Merry Christmas to everyone celebrating today.

I hope you have a joyous, calm, and peaceful holiday. Today, I’m reflecting on how fortunate I am to have the support of friends, neighbors, and fellow Americans, and I thank you for all that you have done to help us. I’m incredibly eager to take my place in Congress and begin my earnest effort toward serving the people of Virginia’s 7th.

Again, thank you so much, Peter, for your involvement and support. I can’t wait to see what we accomplish in 2019 and beyond!

With warmest holiday wishes,

-Abigail

---------------------------------------------
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress |
---------------------------------------------

Spanberger for Congress
PO Box 3121
Glen Allen VA 23058 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please https://act.myngp.com/el/E-jpEQqyTmmWSuUshztPCAh6OE1V7mFI_DNS7PblrmA=/qImVWzSby-O9fK0nSfZ6N1NWeiKAdM3MX_2VQmafP48=.
